title: diphasium alpinum
intro: Diphasium alpinum, also known as the Alpine Club Moss, is a type of plant that belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae, characterized by its unique two-leafed structure. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits of Diphasium alpinum include reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and soothing skin irritations. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically in the form of salves or creams.
